title: SecretStoragePosture
description: Typed durable secrets storage and key-custody posture contract for secure-default and explicit portable-degraded operation.

long_lived_secret_store_authority.description: Contract invariant that only secretsd may durably store long-lived secret material.

secure_storage_preference.description: Secure-default preference for long-lived secret encryption keys.

secure_storage_available.description: Whether secure OS/hardware-backed key storage is currently available.

fail_closed_when_secure_storage_unavaila.description: Fail-closed invariant: secure storage unavailability must not silently degrade posture.

effective_custody_posture.description: Effective custody posture projected for broker/operator surfaces.

portable_passphrase_opt_in.description: Explicit audited opt-in controls for degraded portable passphrase-derived custody mode.

enabled.description: Explicit opt-in flag for passphrase-derived portable custody mode.

kdf_profile.description: Passphrase KDF profile for portable custody mode.

passphrase_source.description: Secret-safe passphrase import source used by portable custody mode.

opt_in_audit_event_hash.description: Audit event hash linking the explicit portable posture authorization.

opted_in_at.description: UTC timestamp when portable custody mode was explicitly enabled.

justification.description: Audited operator justification for degraded portable custody posture.

durable_state.description: Trusted local durable state summary required for restart-safe lease and revocation recovery.

secret_metadata.description: Persisted secret metadata and encrypted material presence summary.

record_count.description: Count of persisted secret metadata records.

encrypted_material_present.description: Whether encrypted secret material exists in durable local state.

lease_state.description: Durable lease lifecycle state summary needed for fail-closed recovery.

active_lease_count.description: Count of active leases in durable state.

expired_lease_count.description: Count of known expired leases retained for recovery safety.

revocation_state.description: Durably persisted lease revocation state summary.

revoked_lease_count.description: Count of durably persisted revoked lease records.

revocation_index_persisted.description: Whether revocation index state is durably persisted for restart recovery.

linkage_metadata.description: Persisted policy and audit linkage metadata summary for deterministic recovery.

policy_binding_hash_count.description: Count of persisted policy binding hashes for lease and secret recovery.

audit_link_hash_count.description: Count of persisted audit linkage hashes for lifecycle reconstruction.

onboarding_contract.description: Contract-level secret onboarding path and audit safety posture that keeps secret values out of protocol-visible audit content.

file_descriptor_support.description: File-descriptor onboarding is supported where platform-appropriate.

audit_metadata_only.description: Audit records capture onboarding metadata only.

audit_includes_secret_values.description: Audit records must never include secret values.

canonical_portable_source.description: Conditional branch for canonical stdin onboarding source.

contains.description: Supported onboarding sources must include stdin.

secure_storage_available.description: Conditional branch when secure storage is unavailable.

portable_passphrase_opt_in.description: Portable passphrase opt-in details required when secure storage is unavailable.

enabled.description: When secure storage is unavailable, portable mode must be explicitly enabled.

effective_custody_posture.description: Secure storage unavailability requires explicit portable degraded posture.

portable_passphrase_opt_in.description: Conditional branch for explicit portable passphrase opt-in posture.
Portable passphrase opt-in requires full audited metadata when enabled.

effective_custody_posture.description: Explicit portable opt-in must project degraded custody posture.
Without explicit portable opt-in, secure default posture is required.
